name: The Irrepressibles
bio: The Irrepressibles draw niche but durable interest through emotionally resonant catalog use in film, TV, and playlists.
notable_for: The Irrepressibles remains closely associated with In This Shirt and Two Men in Love, which still anchor attention around the catalog.
career_highlight: Songs like In This Shirt and Two Men in Love still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming sustains earnings after the original release cycle ends.
Playlist use and rediscovery keep durable songs in circulation.
Licensing and long-tail audience demand extend catalog value over time.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps The Irrepressibles's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: The Irrepressibles's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
